segments.text: 43-year-old at a mobile clinic with a leg cut from debris three days ago.
The wound is getting worse with spreading redness, swelling, and foul drainage.
Supplies are clean dressings and radio.

text: 43-year-old at a mobile clinic with a leg cut from debris three days ago. The wound is getting worse with spreading redness, swelling, and foul drainage. Temperature is unknown. Supplies are clean dressings and radio.
